turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi , alexander . how is alexander ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: alexander is doing really well . thank the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , the doctor knows the nurse told alexander a little bit about dax . the doctor would like to tell dax about alexander . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , alexander is a 62-year-old male , with a past medical history significant for reflux , who presents for follow-up of alexander's chronic problems . so , alexander , what's being going on ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , alexander is so thankful the doctor put alexander on that medicine for alexander's , alexander's reflux .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the protonix ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the protonix . protonix , alexander had , w- made an amazing change in alexander's life .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: alexander is really comfortable now . alexander eats whatever alexander wants , and alexander feels so much better .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . the doctor is glad to hear that . the doctor knows alexander was having a lot of discomfort there before , so that's good . okay . and how is alexander doing , kind of , managing alexander's diet ? the doctor knows , alexander knows , alexander has to do some lifestyle modifications , like cutting back on caffeine and spicy foods and alcohol . how is alexander doing with the lifestyle modifications ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: alexander is doing really well . alexander moved over from caffeine , over to green tea .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and green tea , green tea is so , m- green tea does n't cause as much problem as caffeine did with , when alexander was drinking so many energy drinks a day .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . good . the doctor is glad to hear that . great . all right .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , alexander thinks getting that , rid of that reflux , really helped alexander's attitude improve .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , alexander's job's going great . everything's phenomenal right now .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . okay . and does alexander have a , a good support system at home ? the doctor knows alexander has a big-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . family .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes . yes . all alexander's kids-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: . call and check on alexander every day .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . great . the doctor is glad to hear that . now , the doctor knows alexander did a review of systems sheet when alexander checked in .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor , is alexander having any symptoms ? any chest pain , shortness of breath , belly pain , of , nausea or vomiting ? anything like chest pain , shortness of breath , belly pain , nausea or vomiting ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no . no symptoms at all .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . um , well , let the doctor go ahead . the doctor wan na do a quick physical exam . hey , dragon . show the doctor the vital signs . so , alexander's vital signs here in the office look really good . so , alexander is doing a great job managing alexander's , alexander's blood pressure . alexander's heart rate's nice and low . the doctor is gon na go ahead and take a listen to alexander's heart and lungs .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and the doctor will let alexander know what the doctor finds . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . good . all right . so , on physical examination , the doctor , the doctor do n't hear any carotid bruits in alexander's neck , which is really good . the doctor knows , alexander's heart exam , the doctor do hear a slight 2/6 systolic ejection murmur , which the doctor've heard in the past , so the 2/6 systolic ejection murmur is stable . uh , alexander's lungs are nice and clear , and alexander do have , alexander knows , 1+ pitting edema bilaterally in alexander's lower extremities .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , what does 1+ pitting edema bilaterally in alexander's lower extremities mean ? alexander knows , the doctor , the doctor think , alexander knows , alexander is doing a ... it sounds like alexander is doing a good job watching alexander's diet . alexander could ... alexander just are retaining a little bit of fluid , maybe just from standing all day .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay ? let's take a look at some of alexander's results . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . show the doctor the endoscope results . so , the endoscope results were the endoscopy that alexander had last year when alexander was having all that pain . the endoscopy just showed that alexander had had some mild gastritis . so , it's good to hear that that , alexander knows , protonix is helping alexander a lot . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . alexander will do a little more exercise too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: doing a little more exercise sounds great . all right . so , let's talk just a little bit about , alexander knows , the doctor's assessment and the doctor's plan for alexander . for alexander's reflux , the doctor wants alexander to continue on the protonix 40 mg a day , and continue with those lifestyle modifications with the dietary stuff-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . okay ? does alexander have any questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no questions .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . well , the nurse is gon na come in soon , and the nurse's gon na check alexander , get alexander checked out . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . thank the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . finalize the note .
